task: Implement TODO Step 8 so recorded debugging trajectories can be graded for training readiness, repaired without mutating source events, and exported with a curation quality filter.
summary: Implemented deterministic training-readiness grading, explicit repair-by-new-event capture, default needs_review curation, and quality-filtered trajectory export.
observations: user: Asked to implement the training-grade trajectory TODO one by one until it passes.
agent: Read the trajectory schema, product definition, pack maintenance skill, and current export/shared command paths.
agent: Added a pure deterministic trajectory grader with stable issue codes, token budget diagnostics, event scanning, and invalid schema reporting.
agent: Added grade-trajectories and repair-trajectory CLI/MCP surfaces, plus a quality filter on export-trajectories.
agent: Updated wrapper guidance and schema helper so default row capture uses needs_review unless a row was already accepted.
tool: Focused grade/export tests passed: 21 tests across trajectoryGrade and trajectoryExport.

task.prompt: Implement TODO Step 8 so recorded debugging trajectories can be graded for training readiness, repaired without mutating source events, and exported with a curation quality filter.

context.error: Recorded trajectory rows could be schema-valid and exportable while still being weak training data; the dogfood row used prose-only relevant file summaries and no deterministic grade surface existed.
notes: The reviewer workflow remains explicit and model-gated later; this implementation adds deterministic grading first.
Default row capture now fills missing curation quality with needs_review.

trajectory.content: Asked to implement the training-grade trajectory TODO one by one until it passes.
Read the trajectory schema, product definition, pack maintenance skill, and current export/shared command paths.
Added a pure deterministic trajectory grader with stable issue codes, token budget diagnostics, event scanning, and invalid schema reporting.
Added grade-trajectories and repair-trajectory CLI/MCP surfaces, plus a quality filter on export-trajectories.
Updated wrapper guidance and schema helper so default row capture uses needs_review unless a row was already accepted.
Focused grade/export tests passed: 21 tests across trajectoryGrade and trajectoryExport.
Touched wrapper/adoption/retrieval/schema suite passed: 55 tests across four files.
trajectory.command: npx vitest run tests/wrapperSurfaces.test.ts tests/adoptionScripts.test.ts tests/retrievalBackends.test.ts tests/trajectorySchema.test.ts

trajectory.content: Dogfood event graded needs_review with 3 prose_only_relevant_file diagnostics.
Datalox lint returned ok: true with existing warnings.

final.fix_summary: Implemented deterministic training-readiness grading, explicit repair-by-new-event capture, default needs_review curation, and quality-filtered trajectory export.
final.explanation: Repair is explicit: corrected rows are written as new trajectory events linked to the original event path, and grading never mutates source events.

outcome.label: success
outcome.command: npm run check && npm run build && npx vitest run tests/trajectoryGrade.test.ts tests/trajectoryExport.test.ts && npx vitest run tests/wrapperSurfaces.test.ts tests/adoptionScripts.test.ts tests/retrievalBackends.test.ts tests/trajectorySchema.test.ts && git diff --check && node dist/src/cli/main.js lint --repo . --json
outcome.evidence: TypeScript check and build passed; 21 focused grade/export tests passed; 55 touched wrapper/adoption/retrieval/schema tests passed; dogfood row graded needs_review; git diff --check passed; lint returned ok: true.
